props.description: New Article: The Most Dangerous AI Failure Mode Isn't in the Model. It's Between the Models.

props.text: The Most Dangerous AI Failure Mode Isn't in the Model. It's Between the Models.
The June 6 US AI directive mandated red-teaming for frontier models — but red-teaming tests agents in isolation.

props.label: Enterprises report risky autonomous agent behaviors
Have visibility into what their agents are doing

props.text: The failure mode isn't in any single model; it's in the cascades that emerge when a hundred agents treat each other's outputs as trusted inputs.
MiroShark's multi-agent simulation layer — suggest_scenarios, director_mode, multi-round propagation — is the testing infrastructure that regulatory frameworks haven't required yet but will need to.

props.title: Read: The Most Dangerous AI Failure Mode Isn't in the Model. It's Between the Models.
